ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-14-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.

Petitioner: Lai Na Seong Tam present in pro per, was sworn and examined Through Kallyn Ieong, Mandarin Interpreter.
